name: python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy
title: python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy
description:
SQLAlchemy integration with marshmallow (Python3)
SQLAlchemy integration with the marshmallow (de)serialization library.
.
It allows one to declare your models, generate marshmallow schemas, and
(de)serialize your data.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy because SQLAlchemy integration with marshmallow (Python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-marshmallow-sqlalchemy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
